mapper.sql: id, plan_id, task_id, execution_id, evaluator_type, experiment_key, experiment_variant, schema_version, score, is_pass, feedback, payload, created_at

sql.if: AND ( COALESCE(task_id::text, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(execution_id::text, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(feedback, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(payload::text, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(experiment_key, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(experiment_variant, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quality_evaluation_events ( plan_id, task_id, execution_id, evaluator_type, experiment_key, experiment_variant, schema_version, score, is_pass, feedback, payload, created_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{taskId}, #{executionId}, #{evaluatorType}, #{experimentKey}, #{experimentVariant}, #{schemaVersion}, #{score}, #{pass}, #{feedback}, #{payload}::jsonb, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
